| `recommends` | list of string | тАФ | Packages recommended (soft dependency) by this package. |
| `release` | string | тАФ | Package release number. |
| `replaces` | list of string | тАФ | Packages this package replaces (for upgrade paths from old package names). |
| `rpm` | NfpmRpmConfig | тАФ | RPM-specific configuration. |
| `scripts` | NfpmScripts | тАФ | Package lifecycle scripts (preinstall, postinstall, preremove, postremove). |
| `section` | string | тАФ | Package section (e.g. "utils", "devel"). |
| `suggests` | list of string | тАФ | Packages suggested (weaker than recommends) by this package. |
| `templated_contents` | list of NfpmContent | тАФ | Extra file contents whose source files are Tera-rendered before packaging. Each entry mirrors `contents`; the difference is that at stage time the file at `src` is read, rendered through the template engine, written to a temp file, and then included in the package at `dst` using the temp file as the real source. Useful for shipping config files with templated values (version, commit, maintainer, etc.). |
| `templated_scripts` | NfpmScripts | тАФ | Lifecycle scripts whose script-file bodies are Tera-rendered before packaging Each path is read, rendered through the template engine, written to a temp file, and used as the real script. If a field is set on both `scripts` and `templated_scripts`, the templated version wins. |
| `umask` | integer | тАФ | File permission umask. Accepts a YAML int (`18`), an octal-prefixed string (`"0o022"`), or a leading-zero octal string (`"022"`). |
| `vendor` | string | тАФ | Package vendor name тАФ the distributing entity recorded in the rpm/deb Vendor field. When unset, derived from the crate's first `Cargo.toml [package].authors` entry with any `<email>` suffix stripped (e.g. `"Ada Lovelace <ada@x>"` тЖТ `"Ada Lovelace"`). |
| `version_metadata` | string | тАФ | Version metadata (e.g. git commit hash). |

## `crates[].publish`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `aur` | AurConfig | тАФ | AUR (Arch User Repository) binary package publishing configuration. |
| `aur_source` | AurSourceConfig | тАФ | AUR source package publishing configuration (source-only PKGBUILD, not -bin). |
| `cargo` | CargoPublishConfig | тАФ | Publish to crates.io. Presence opts in; use `cargo: { skip: true }` to opt out. |
| `chocolatey` | ChocolateyConfig | тАФ | Chocolatey package publishing configuration. |
| `homebrew` | HomebrewConfig | тАФ | Homebrew formula publishing configuration. |
| `homebrew_cask` | HomebrewCaskConfig | тАФ | Homebrew Cask publishing configuration (macOS .app bundles).<br><br>Uses the unified `HomebrewCaskConfig` which carries all fields from both the per-crate cask config and the top-level `homebrew_casks:` config. |
| `krew` | KrewConfig | тАФ | Krew (kubectl plugin manager) manifest publishing configuration. |
| `nix` | NixConfig | тАФ | Nix derivation publishing configuration. |
| `on_error` | list of HookEntry | тАФ | Hooks that fire once per FAILED publisher, after rollback has been attempted. Each entry is a standard hook (`cmd` / `dir` / `env` / `output`); the template surface adds `{{ .Publisher }}`, `{{ .Error }}`, `{{ .Version }}`, `{{ .Tag }}`, `{{ .Group }}` (Assets/Manager/Submitter), `{{ .Required }}`, `{{ .RolledBack }}` тАФ true if any publisher was rolled back (or rollback was attempted and failed) during this run тАФ and `{{ .RunReport }}`, the path of this run's already-written `dist/run-<id>/report.json` (per-publisher outcomes including rollback results; empty in snapshot/dry-run or when the report could not be persisted). The same values are also exported to the hook process as environment variables: `ANODIZER_PUBLISHER`, `ANODIZER_ERROR`, `ANODIZER_VERSION`, `ANODIZER_TAG`, `ANODIZER_GROUP`, `ANODIZER_REQUIRED`, `ANODIZER_ROLLED_BACK`, `ANODIZER_RUN_REPORT`. A hook's own failure is logged as a warning and never changes the release outcome.<br><br>Security: the rendered `cmd` string is parsed by `sh -c`, and `{{ .Error }}` carries untrusted remote text (HTTP error bodies, git stderr) тАФ interpolating it into `cmd` lets crafted error content break quoting and execute. Read untrusted values from the env vars instead (`$ANODIZER_ERROR`), and pass `anodizer notify --raw` so the text is sent literally rather than Tera-rendered. The outbound notification body is secret-redacted by default, so a secret reference smuggled into the error body is masked (sent as `$NAME`) even without `--raw`; `--raw` stays recommended because it avoids re-rendering already-final text and keeps untrusted content out of the shell-parsed `cmd` string:<br><br>```yaml publish: on_error: - cmd: 'anodizer notify --raw "anodizer: $ANODIZER_PUBLISHER failed @ $ANODIZER_VERSION: $ANODIZER_ERROR"' ``` |
| `on_rollback` | list of HookEntry | тАФ | Hooks that fire once per publisher that a triggered rollback REVERTED тАФ including a publisher that itself `Succeeded` and was only reverted because a sibling required publisher failed (the case `on_error`, which fires solely for the failed publisher, never reaches). A publisher whose rollback was attempted but could not complete fires this too, with `{{ .RollbackFailed }}` set to `true` so the hook can escalate the orphaned-artifact case. Each entry is a standard hook (`cmd` / `dir` / `env` / `output`); the template surface adds `{{ .Publisher }}`, `{{ .Version }}`, `{{ .Tag }}`, `{{ .Group }}` (Assets/Manager/Submitter), `{{ .Required }}`, `{{ .RollbackFailed }}` (`true` when the revert itself failed), `{{ .Error }}` (the rollback failure message, empty on a clean revert), and `{{ .Reason }}` (the run-wide sibling failure(s) that triggered the unwind тАФ distinct from `{{ .Error }}`; empty on a `--rollback-only` replay). The same values are exported to the hook process as `ANODIZER_PUBLISHER`, `ANODIZER_VERSION`, `ANODIZER_TAG`, `ANODIZER_GROUP`, `ANODIZER_REQUIRED`, `ANODIZER_ROLLBACK_FAILED`, `ANODIZER_ERROR`, and `ANODIZER_ROLLBACK_REASON`. A hook's own failure is logged as a warning and never changes the release outcome or aborts the remaining rollbacks. It is independent of `on_error`: a publisher that both failed and was rolled back fires both.<br><br>```yaml publish: on_rollback: - cmd: 'anodizer notify --raw "anodizer: $ANODIZER_PUBLISHER reverted @ $ANODIZER_VERSION (rollback_failed=$ANODIZER_ROLLBACK_FAILED)"' ``` |
| `scoop` | ScoopConfig | тАФ | Scoop manifest publishing configuration. |
| `winget` | WingetConfig | тАФ | WinGet manifest publishing configuration. |

## `crates[].publish.cargo`
`cargo publish` flag surface.

Presence under `publish:` opts the crate in; use `skip: true` (or a truthy template) to opt out. There is no `enabled` field тАФ presence is the on-switch.

Fields intentionally omitted because anodizer owns them: - `--package` / `--workspace` / `--exclude`: the top-level `crates[]` axis owns crate selection. - `--dry-run`: pipeline-level CLI ergonomics (`anodizer release --dry-run`). - `-v` / `-q` / `--color`: CLI ergonomics, not config. - `--config` / `-Z`: cargo CLI escape hatches; out of scope.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `all_features` | bool | тАФ | Activate every feature, including `default` (`--all-features`). |
| `allow_dirty` | bool | тАФ | Allow publishing with an uncommitted working tree (`--allow-dirty`). |
| `auth` | CargoAuthMode | тАФ | Whether the publish authenticates with a long-lived API token (`CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN`) or with GitHub Actions OIDC (crates.io Trusted Publishing). Default `Auto`: a token when one is present, otherwise a Trusted-Publishing exchange when an OIDC context is available.<br><br>`oidc` mints a short-lived crates.io token from a GitHub Actions id-token тАФ no stored `CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN` is needed тАФ and revokes it after the publish loop. The mint is workspace-scoped: one token authorizes every crate whose Trusted-Publisher config matches this repository/workflow, so a lockstep workspace mints once and reuses it for all crates.<br><br>When omitted, resolves to `Auto`. Optional (rather than a bare enum with `#[serde(default)]`) so a `defaults.publish.cargo.auth` value is inherited by a per-crate `publish.cargo` block that omits `auth`: a bare enum always serializes to a concrete value, and the defaults deep-merge (fill-by-missing-key) never overwrites a present scalar, so a strict `oidc` default would silently degrade to `auto`. Read through `CargoPublishConfig::resolved_auth` so every call site agrees on the `None` тЖТ `Auto` collapse.<br><br>`Auto`: CargoAuthMode::Auto |
| `features` | list of string | тАФ | Crate features to activate (`--features`). |
| `frozen` | bool | тАФ | Both `--locked` and `--offline` (`--frozen`). |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the cargo publisher is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. Config key: the publisher's `if:`. |
| `index` | string | тАФ | Registry index URL (`--index`). |
| `index_timeout` | integer | тАФ | Seconds to wait for the crates.io sparse index to publish a crate before its dependents are pushed (anodizer-original тАФ no `cargo publish` equivalent). |
| `jobs` | integer | тАФ | Number of parallel compile jobs for verification (`--jobs`). |
| `keep_going` | bool | тАФ | Continue on errors when verifying multiple crates (`--keep-going`). |
| `locked` | bool | тАФ | Require an up-to-date `Cargo.lock` matching the resolver (`--locked`). |
| `manifest_path` | string | тАФ | Path to the crate's `Cargo.toml` (`--manifest-path`). |
| `no_default_features` | bool | тАФ | Disable the `default` feature set (`--no-default-features`). |
| `no_verify` | bool | тАФ | Skip the local `cargo build --release` verification step (`--no-verify`). |
| `offline` | bool | тАФ | Require offline resolution; never hit the network (`--offline`). |
| `registry` | string | тАФ | Alternate registry name from `~/.cargo/config.toml` (`--registry`). |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `true` тАФ a failure here aborts the release. Set to `false` to log failures but continue. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip this publisher; supports template strings or bool. Truthy renders disable the publisher without removing the block. |
| `target` | string | тАФ | Build target triple for the verification step (`--target`). |
| `target_dir` | string | тАФ | Override the cargo target directory (`--target-dir`). |
| `wait_for_workspace_deps` | WaitForWorkspaceDepsConfig | тАФ | Pre-publish gate that polls crates.io for every workspace-internal dep of the crate being published, blocking until each is queryable at its expected version. Required for multi-tag-multi-crate workspaces (e.g. cfgd) where per-crate tags fire independent `Release.yml` runs that would otherwise race the sparse-index propagation.<br><br>Single-crate workspaces and lockstep-bumped monorepos (anodizer itself) leave this off тАФ there is no inter-tag race to gate on. |

## `crates[].publish.homebrew`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | тАФ | amd64 microarchitecture variant filter (`v1` / `v2` / `v3` / `v4`). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. Default: `v1`. Typed as `Amd64Variant`, so any value outside `v1`..`v4` is rejected when the config is parsed. |
| `arm_variant` | string | тАФ | ARM version filter (e.g. "6", "7"). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. |
| `cask` | HomebrewCaskConfig | тАФ | Homebrew Cask configuration (macOS .app bundles). |
| `caveats` | string | тАФ | Post-install user-facing notes shown by `brew info`. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | тАФ | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | тАФ | Custom commit message template. Rendered via Tera with the standard release template variables (`ProjectName`, `Tag`, `Version`, etc.). Default: `"Brew formula update for {{ ProjectName }} version {{ Tag }}"` (set in `crates/stage-publish/src/homebrew.rs::default_commit_msg_template`). |
| `completions` | HomebrewCaskCompletions | тАФ | Prebuilt shell-completion file paths to install. When set, the formula emits `bash_completion.install "<path>"` / `zsh_completion.install` / `fish_completion.install` in its install block тАФ the form used when the archive ships ready-made completion files. |
| `conflicts` | list of HomebrewConflict | тАФ | Conflicting formula names with optional reason. |
| `custom_block` | string | тАФ | Custom Ruby code block inserted into the formula class body. |
| `custom_require` | string | тАФ | Ruby `require` statement for custom download strategies. |
| `dependencies` | list of HomebrewDependency | тАФ | Package dependencies (e.g. `openssl`, `libgit2`). |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Short description of the formula (shown in `brew info`). |
| `directory` | string | тАФ | Formula directory in the tap (e.g. "Formula"). |
| `download_strategy` | string | тАФ | Custom download strategy class name (e.g. `:using => GitHubPrivateRepositoryReleaseDownloadStrategy`). |
| `extra_install` | string | тАФ | Additional install commands appended after the main install block. |
| `generate_completions_from_executable` | HomebrewCaskGeneratedCompletions | тАФ | Generate completions by running the installed binary at install time. Renders the modern homebrew-core idiom `generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"<exe>", ...)` in the install block. Preferred over `completions` when the binary can emit its own completions; the two are independent and may both be set. |
| `homepage` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL. Falls back to the GitHub release URL when unset. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the Homebrew publisher is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. Config key: `brews[].if:`. |
| `install` | string | тАФ | Ruby `install` block content for the formula. |
| `license` | string | тАФ | SPDX license identifier (e.g., "MIT", "Apache-2.0"). |
| `livecheck` | HomebrewLivecheck | тАФ | `livecheck` stanza configuration for the formula. When unset, a binary tap formula emits `livecheck { skip "Auto-generated on release." }` to match the cask (the archive URL/sha are rewritten on every release, so `brew livecheck` cannot meaningfully poll). Set `strategy:` / `regex:`/`url:` to opt into active version detection instead. |
| `manpages` | list of string | тАФ | Manpage file paths to install into the formula's `man1` (e.g. `["mytool.1"]`). Each entry renders a `man1.install "<path>"` line in the install block, mirroring real Rust-CLI formulae (ripgrep, fd, bat). A path ending in `.N` (where N is 1тАУ8) routes to the matching `manN` section; anything else defaults to `man1`. |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Override the formula name (default: crate name). |
| `plist` | string | тАФ | Launchd plist content for `brew services`. |
| `post_install` | string | тАФ | Post-install commands (separate `def post_install` block in formula). |
| `repository` | RepositoryConfig | тАФ | Unified repository config with branch, token, PR, git SSH support. (Replaces the legacy `tap: TapConfig` owner/name-only form.) |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `service` | string | тАФ | Homebrew service block content (alternative to plist). |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip publishing the formula.  `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prerelease versions. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `test` | string | тАФ | Ruby `test` block content for the formula (run by `brew test`). |
| `url_headers` | list of string | тАФ | HTTP headers to include in download requests (e.g. for private repos). |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Custom URL template for download URLs (overrides release URL). |

## `crates[].publish.homebrew_cask`
Unified Homebrew Cask configuration.

Used at both call-sites: - `homebrew_casks:` тАФ top-level array; carries `repository`, `commit_author`, `directory`, `ids`, `url`, structured `uninstall`/`zap`, etc. - `crates[].publish.homebrew_cask:` тАФ per-crate override; same shape, with `url_template` as the simpler URL alternative.

Fields from both original types are present; any field may be `None` at either call-site. The union avoids a two-type bifurcation while keeping both axes.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `alternative_names` | list of string | тАФ | Alternative cask names (aliases). |
| `app` | string | тАФ | macOS .app bundle name (e.g. "MyApp.app"). |
| `binaries` | list of HomebrewCaskBinary | тАФ | Binary stubs to create in /usr/local/bin.<br><br>Each entry is either a bare string (`"my-cli"` тЖТ emits `binary "my-cli"`) or a structured `{ name, target }` object (`{ name: "my-cli", target: "mycli" }` тЖТ emits `binary "my-cli", target: "mycli"`). The `target:` form mirrors the Homebrew Ruby cask DSL for binary renames тАФ without it, a wrapped binary installs at the wrong path. Cask binary entry. |
| `binary` | string | тАФ | Deprecated singular spelling of `binaries`. The upstream replaced `binary: foo` with `binaries: [foo]`; this field captures the legacy spelling so imported configs keep parsing. `apply_homebrew_cask_legacy_singulars` folds the value into `binaries` at config-load time and emits a one-time deprecation warning per occurrence. The field is excluded from serialization so a round-tripped config emits only the canonical plural form. |
| `caveats` | string | тАФ | Custom caveats shown after install. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | тАФ | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | тАФ | Custom commit message template. Default: "Brew cask update for {{ ProjectName }} version {{ Tag }}" |
| `completions` | HomebrewCaskCompletions | тАФ | Shell completion definitions. |
| `conflicts` | list of HomebrewCaskConflictEntry | тАФ | Conflicting casks or formulae. |
| `custom_block` | string | тАФ | Arbitrary Ruby code inserted into the cask block. |
| `dependencies` | list of HomebrewCaskDependencyEntry | тАФ | Cask dependencies (other casks or formulae). |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Cask description. |
| `directory` | string | тАФ | Subdirectory in the tap repo for cask placement (default: "Casks"). |
| `generate_completions_from_executable` | HomebrewCaskGeneratedCompletions | тАФ | Auto-generate shell completions from an executable. |
| `homepage` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL. |
| `hooks` | HomebrewCaskHooks | тАФ | Pre/post install/uninstall hooks. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts from builds whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the Homebrew Cask config is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. Config key: `homebrew_casks[].if:`. |
| `license` | string | тАФ | License identifier (SPDX). |
| `livecheck` | HomebrewLivecheck | тАФ | `livecheck` stanza configuration for the cask. When unset, the cask emits `livecheck do\n  skip "Auto-generated on release."\nend` (a binary cask's download URL/sha256 are rewritten on every release, so `brew livecheck` has nothing stable to poll). Set `strategy:` / `url:` / `regex:` (with `skip: false`) to opt into active version detection тАФ the same shape a Homebrew cask `livecheck do тАж end` block accepts. Reuses the formula `livecheck` config type. |
| `manpage` | string | тАФ | Deprecated singular spelling of `manpages`. The upstream replaced `manpage: foo.1` with `manpages: [foo.1]`; this field captures the legacy spelling so imported configs keep parsing. `apply_homebrew_cask_legacy_singulars` folds the value into `manpages` at config-load time and emits a one-time deprecation warning per occurrence. The field is excluded from serialization so a round-tripped config emits only the canonical plural form. |
| `manpages` | list of string | тАФ | Manual page references to install. |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Cask name (default: crate / project name). |
| `repository` | RepositoryConfig | тАФ | Unified repository config for the Homebrew tap. |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `service` | string | тАФ | Homebrew service definition. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip publishing the cask. `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prerelease versions. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `uninstall` | HomebrewCaskUninstall | тАФ | Structured uninstall stanza configuration. |
| `update_existing_pr` | StringOrBool | тАФ | When true, force-push the updated cask file to the existing PR branch when a PR for the same head branch already exists. The PR content is updated in place rather than creating a duplicate. When false (default), the push is skipped and a warning is emitted so the operator sees that the publisher did not update the PR. |
| `url` | HomebrewCaskURL | тАФ | Structured download URL configuration (top-level axis). |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Simple URL template for the .dmg/.zip download (per-crate shorthand).<br><br>Cannot be combined with `url.template:` тАФ set one or the other. If both are present, config validation rejects the config at parse time. Use `url:` for the structured form (verified domain, custom headers, etc.) or `url_template:` for a bare string shorthand тАФ never both simultaneously. |
| `zap` | HomebrewCaskUninstall | тАФ | Deep uninstall (zap) stanza configuration. |

## `crates[].publish.scoop`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | тАФ | amd64 microarchitecture variant filter (`v1` / `v2` / `v3` / `v4`). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. Default: `v1`. Typed as `Amd64Variant`, so any value outside `v1`..`v4` is rejected when the config is parsed. |
| `checkver` | string | тАФ | Scoop `checkver` strategy used by bucket maintainers to detect new releases. Defaults to `"github"` (derived from the configured GitHub repo) тАФ `ScoopInstaller/Main` requires checkver for automated-update PRs. Override with a homepage regex when GitHub release detection is not appropriate.<br><br>Example: `checkver: "github"` or `checkver: "v([\\d.]+)"`. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | тАФ | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | тАФ | Custom commit message template. |
| `depends` | list of string | тАФ | Application dependencies (other Scoop packages). |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Short description of the package (shown in `scoop info`). |
| `directory` | string | тАФ | Subdirectory in the bucket repo for manifest placement. Defaults to `bucket` тАФ scoop resolves manifests only from `bucket/` when that directory exists (root otherwise), so `bucket/` is correct for both layouts. Set to `""` to target the repo root. A stale same-named root-level manifest is removed when publishing into a subdirectory. |
| `homepage` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL. Falls back to the GitHub-derived URL when unset. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the Scoop publisher is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. Config key: `scoop[].if:`. |
| `license` | string | тАФ | SPDX license identifier (e.g., "MIT", "Apache-2.0"). |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Override the manifest name (default: crate name). |
| `persist` | list of string | тАФ | Data paths persisted between Scoop updates. |
| `post_install` | list of string | тАФ | Commands to run after installation. |
| `pre_install` | list of string | тАФ | Commands to run before installation. |
| `repository` | RepositoryConfig | тАФ | Unified repository config with branch, token, PR, git SSH support. (Replaces the legacy `bucket: BucketConfig` owner/name-only form.) |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `shortcuts` | list of list of string | тАФ | Start menu shortcuts as `[executable, label]` pairs. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip publishing the manifest.  `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prerelease versions. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Custom URL template for download URLs (overrides release URL). |
| `use` | string | тАФ | Artifact selection: "archive" (default), "msi", or "nsis". |

## `crates[].publish.chocolatey`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | тАФ | amd64 microarchitecture variant filter (`v1` / `v2` / `v3` / `v4`). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. Default: `v1`. Typed as `Amd64Variant`, so any value outside `v1`..`v4` is rejected when the config is parsed. |
| `api_key` | string | тАФ | Chocolatey API key for `choco push`. Falls back to `CHOCOLATEY_API_KEY` env var. |
| `authors` | string | тАФ | Package author(s) displayed in the Chocolatey gallery. |
| `bug_tracker_url` | string | тАФ | Bug tracker URL (`<bugTrackerUrl>`). Defaults to `{repository}/issues` when unset. |
| `copyright` | string | тАФ | Copyright notice. |
| `dependencies` | list of ChocolateyDependency | тАФ | Package dependencies with optional version constraints. |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Package description (supports markdown). |
| `docs_url` | string | тАФ | Documentation URL. |
| `icon_url` | string | тАФ | URL to the package icon image shown in the Chocolatey gallery. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the Chocolatey publisher is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. Config key: `chocolateys[].if:`. |
| `license` | string | тАФ | SPDX license expression (e.g. "MIT", "Apache-2.0", "MIT OR Apache-2.0"). Not emitted as a nuspec element тАФ Chocolatey CLI does not support the NuGet `<license>` element (it warns CHCU0002: "use <licenseUrl> instead") тАФ it gates the `<licenseUrl>` derivation: a single identifier derives a LICENSE blob URL; a compound expression has no single canonical file, so set `license_url` explicitly. |
| `license_url` | string | тАФ | Optional explicit `<licenseUrl>` тАФ Chocolatey's only supported license metadata. When unset, anodizer derives a real GitHub `тАж/blob/<tag>/LICENSE` URL from `repository` (what ripgrep / fd / gh ship); when no repository is known or `license` is a compound SPDX expression, no `<licenseUrl>` is emitted. anodizer never synthesizes an `opensource.org/licenses/<spdx>` URL тАФ it 404s for compound SPDX and gets the package rejected at moderation. |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Override the package name (default: crate name). |
| `owners` | string | тАФ | Package owners (Chocolatey gallery user). |
| `package_source_url` | string | тАФ | URL shown as the package source in the Chocolatey gallery. |
| `post_publish_poll` | PostPublishPollConfig | тАФ | Post-publish moderation-queue polling settings. Polling is disabled by default тАФ Chocolatey's community moderation queue routinely takes hours to days, and blocking a CI workflow on that wait is wrong. Opt in per-publisher with `post_publish_poll: { enabled: true }` when running locally and willing to wait, or disable globally via `--no-post-publish-poll`. |
| `project_source_url` | string | тАФ | Source code project URL (`<projectSourceUrl>`). Defaults to the derived `repository` URL when unset. |
| `project_url` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL. |
| `release_notes` | string | тАФ | Release notes for this version. |
| `repository` | RepositoryConfig | тАФ | Unified project repo config (owner/name). Used to derive `<projectUrl>` (the Chocolatey gallery link) and download URLs. `<projectUrl>` resolves through `project_url:` (if set) тЖТ derived `https://github.com/{repository.owner}/{repository.name}`. |
| `republish_in_moderation` | StringOrBool | тАФ | When true, re-push the nupkg even when a version is already in the community moderation queue (PackageStatus=Submitted). Chocolatey's API accepts re-pushes of in-moderation versions; the new nupkg replaces the queued one. When false (default), the push is skipped and a warning is emitted so the operator sees that the publisher did not push. |
| `require_license_acceptance` | bool | тАФ | Require license acceptance before install. |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip pushing to the Chocolatey community repository. Bool, string, or template expression (e.g. `"{{ IsSnapshot }}"`). Accepts the legacy `skip_publish:` spelling for back-compat with configs; canonical name is `skip:` to align with every other publisher. |
| `source_repo` | string | тАФ | Push source URL (default: "https://push.chocolatey.org/"). |
| `summary` | string | тАФ | Short summary of the package. |
| `tags` | list of string | тАФ | Tags for the Chocolatey gallery (joined with single spaces in the emitted nuspec). Always a typed list тАФ the legacy space-separated-string form was dropped now for IDE-completion friendliness and to remove whitespace ambiguity. |
| `title` | string | тАФ | Package title (default: project name). |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Custom URL template for download URLs (overrides release URL). |
| `use` | string | тАФ | Artifact selection: "archive" (default), "msi", or "nsis". |

## `crates[].publish.winget`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | тАФ | amd64 microarchitecture variant filter (`v1` / `v2` / `v3` / `v4`). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. Default: `v1`. Typed as `Amd64Variant`, so any value outside `v1`..`v4` is rejected when the config is parsed. |
| `author` | string | тАФ | Author name. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | тАФ | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | тАФ | Custom commit message template. |
| `copyright` | string | тАФ | Copyright notice. |
| `copyright_url` | string | тАФ | Copyright URL. |
| `default_locale` | string | тАФ | Locale stamped into the WinGet manifests: the version manifest's `DefaultLocale`, the installer manifest's `InstallerLocale`, the locale manifest's `PackageLocale`, and the locale manifest's `.locale.<locale>.yaml` file name. Supports templates. Default: `en-US`.<br><br>```yaml winget: default_locale: "pt-BR" ``` |
| `dependencies` | list of WingetDependency | тАФ | Package dependencies. |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Full package description displayed in the WinGet gallery. |
| `documentations` | list of WingetDocumentation | тАФ | Documentation links rendered as the `Documentations[]` block on the locale manifest. Each entry is a `{ label, url }` pair surfaced in the winget gallery (real ripgrep emits a `FAQ` and a `User Guide` entry). Omitted entirely when empty.<br><br>Example: ```yaml documentations: - label: "User Guide" url: "https://github.com/owner/repo/blob/master/GUIDE.md" ``` |
| `homepage` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the WinGet publisher is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. Config key: `winget[].if:`. |
| `installation_notes` | string | тАФ | Post-install notes shown to the user. |
| `license` | string | тАФ | License identifier (required, e.g. "MIT"). |
| `license_url` | string | тАФ | License URL. |
| `moniker` | string | тАФ | Short invoke alias shown as the package `Moniker` (e.g. `rg` for ripgrep, `fd` for fd). This is the command users type, NOT the package/crate name. When unset, anodizer derives it from the single published binary name; with multiple binaries and no override the Moniker is omitted (winget treats it as optional).<br><br>Example: `moniker: "rg"`. |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Override the package name (default: crate name). |
| `package_identifier` | string | тАФ | WinGet package identifier (e.g. "Publisher.AppName"). Auto-generated if empty. |
| `package_name` | string | тАФ | Package name as displayed (default: same as name). |
| `path` | string | тАФ | Manifest file path (auto-generated if empty from publisher/name/version). |
| `post_publish_poll` | PostPublishPollConfig | тАФ | Post-publish PR-validation polling settings. Polling is disabled by default тАФ winget-pkgs PR validation routinely takes hours to days, and blocking a CI workflow on that wait is wrong. Opt in per-publisher with `post_publish_poll: { enabled: true }` when running locally and willing to wait, or disable globally via `--no-post-publish-poll`. |
| `privacy_url` | string | тАФ | Privacy policy URL. |
| `product_code` | string | тАФ | Product code for the installer (used in Add/Remove Programs). |
| `publisher` | string | тАФ | Publisher name (required). |
| `publisher_support_url` | string | тАФ | Publisher support URL. |
| `publisher_url` | string | тАФ | Publisher homepage URL shown in the WinGet manifest. |
| `release_notes` | string | тАФ | Release notes for this version. |
| `release_notes_url` | string | тАФ | URL to full release notes. |
| `repository` | RepositoryConfig | тАФ | Unified repository config with branch, token, PR, git SSH support. (Replaces the legacy `manifests_repo: WingetManifestsRepoConfig`.) |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `short_description` | string | тАФ | Short description (required, max 256 chars). |
| `silent_switch` | string | тАФ | Silent-install switch string emitted as `InstallerSwitches.Silent` for actual installers (`wix`/`msi`/`exe`/`nsis`). When unset, anodizer derives the switch from the installer type (`/quiet` for msi, `/S` for exe/nsis). Never emitted for `zip`/`portable` artifacts.<br><br>Example: `silent_switch: "/qn"`. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip publishing. `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prereleases. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `tags` | list of string | тАФ | Tags for package discovery (lowercased, spacesтЖТhyphens). |
| `update_existing_pr` | StringOrBool | тАФ | When true, force-push the updated manifest to the existing PR branch when a PR for the same head branch already exists. The PR content is updated in place rather than creating a duplicate. When false (default), the push is skipped and a warning is emitted so the operator sees that the publisher did not update the PR. |
| `upgrade_behavior` | string | тАФ | Installer `UpgradeBehavior` for every installer entry. winget accepts `install`, `uninstallPrevious`, and `deny`. Defaults to `install` тАФ the correct behavior for portable-zip CLI tools (`uninstallPrevious` forces a clobbering reinstall).<br><br>Example: `upgrade_behavior: "uninstallPrevious"`. |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Custom URL template for download URLs (overrides release URL). |
| `use` | string | тАФ | Artifact selection: "archive" (default), "msi", or "nsis". |

## `crates[].publish.aur`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | тАФ | amd64 microarchitecture variant filter (`v1` / `v2` / `v3` / `v4`). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. Default: `v1`. Typed as `Amd64Variant`, so any value outside `v1`..`v4` is rejected when the config is parsed. |
| `backup` | list of string | тАФ | List of config files to preserve on upgrade (relative to `/`). |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | тАФ | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | тАФ | Custom commit message template. Default: "Update to {{ version }}". |
| `conflicts` | list of string | тАФ | Packages this PKGBUILD conflicts with. |
| `contributors` | list of string | тАФ | Contributors listed in PKGBUILD comments. |
| `depends` | list of string | тАФ | Runtime dependencies required by this package. |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Short description of the package for PKGBUILD. |
| `directory` | string | тАФ | Subdirectory in the git repo for committed files. |
| `git_ssh_command` | string | тАФ | Custom SSH command for git operations. |
| `git_url` | string | тАФ | AUR SSH git URL override. Defaults to `ssh://aur@aur.archlinux.org/<package>.git`, derived from the resolved package name; set this only for a non-standard endpoint. |
| `homepage` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the AUR publisher is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. The `aurs[].if:` conditional gate. |
| `install` | string | тАФ | Content for a .install file (post-install/pre-remove scripts). |
| `license` | string | тАФ | SPDX license identifier (e.g., "MIT", "Apache-2.0"). |
| `maintainers` | list of string | тАФ | PKGBUILD maintainer entries (e.g., "Name <email@example.com>"). |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Override the package name (default: crate name + "-bin"). |
| `optdepends` | list of string | тАФ | Optional dependencies with descriptions (e.g., "fzf: fuzzy finder support"). |
| `package` | string | тАФ | Custom PKGBUILD `package()` function body. |
| `private_key` | string | тАФ | Path to SSH private key file. |
| `provides` | list of string | тАФ | Packages this PKGBUILD provides (virtual package names). |
| `rel` | string | тАФ | Package release number (default: "1"). |
| `replaces` | list of string | тАФ | Packages this PKGBUILD replaces (for upgrade paths from old package names). |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip this AUR config. Accepts bool or template string (e.g. `"{{ if .IsSnapshot }}true{{ endif }}"` for conditional skip). Accepts the legacy `disable:` spelling via serde alias for back-compat. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip publishing. `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prereleases. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Custom URL template for download URLs (overrides release URL). |

## `crates[].publish.aur_source`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | тАФ | `x86_64` micro-architecture variant тАФ `v1` (baseline), `v2`, `v3` (AVX2), or `v4`. Constrained to a typed enum because AUR source pkgs build from the upstream tarball (no binary artifacts to filter), so the value's only role is as the `Amd64` template var consumed by `prepare:` / `build:` / `package:` script bodies тАФ typos must fail at parse time, not silently render an invalid string into the PKGBUILD. When unset, defaults to `v1` at template-render time. |
| `arches` | list of string | тАФ | Explicit architecture list (default: auto-detect from artifacts). |
| `backup` | list of string | тАФ | Backup files to preserve on upgrade. |
| `build` | string | тАФ | Custom `build()` function body for PKGBUILD. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | тАФ | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | тАФ | Custom commit message template. |
| `conflicts` | list of string | тАФ | Packages this PKGBUILD conflicts with. |
| `contributors` | list of string | тАФ | Contributors listed in PKGBUILD comments. |
| `depends` | list of string | тАФ | Runtime dependencies. |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Short description of the package. |
| `directory` | string | тАФ | Subdirectory in the git repo for committed files. |
| `git_ssh_command` | string | тАФ | Custom SSH command for git operations. |
| `git_url` | string | тАФ | AUR SSH git URL override. Defaults to `ssh://aur@aur.archlinux.org/<package>.git`, derived from the resolved package name; set this only for a non-standard endpoint. |
| `homepage` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the AUR source config is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. The `aur_sources[].if:`. |
| `install` | string | тАФ | Content for a .install file (post-install/pre-remove scripts). |
| `license` | string | тАФ | SPDX license identifier. |
| `maintainers` | list of string | тАФ | PKGBUILD maintainer entries. |
| `makedepends` | list of string | тАФ | Build-time dependencies (source packages need these). |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Override the package name (default: crate name, no -bin suffix). |
| `optdepends` | list of string | тАФ | Optional dependencies. |
| `package` | string | тАФ | Custom `package()` function body for PKGBUILD. |
| `prepare` | string | тАФ | Custom `prepare()` function body for PKGBUILD. |
| `private_key` | string | тАФ | Path to SSH private key file. |
| `provides` | list of string | тАФ | Packages this PKGBUILD provides. |
| `rel` | string | тАФ | Package release number (default: "1"). |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip this config. Accepts the legacy `disable:` spelling via serde alias for back-compat. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip publishing. `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prereleases. |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Custom URL template for download URLs. |

## `crates[].publish.krew`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | тАФ | amd64 microarchitecture variant filter (`v1` / `v2` / `v3` / `v4`). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. Default: `v1`. Typed as `Amd64Variant`, so any value outside `v1`..`v4` is rejected when the config is parsed. |
| `arm_variant` | string | тАФ | ARM version filter (e.g. "6", "7"). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. |
| `caveats` | string | тАФ | Post-install message shown to the user. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | тАФ | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | тАФ | Custom commit message template. |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Full description of the kubectl plugin. |
| `homepage` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL for the plugin. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the Krew publisher is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. Config key: `krews[].if:`. |
| `mode` | KrewMode | тАФ | Which krew-index submission path to take.<br><br>- `auto` (default): probe whether the plugin already exists in `kubernetes-sigs/krew-index`. Already present тЖТ `bot` (the hosted krew-release-bot opens the version-bump PR server-side); definitively absent тЖТ `pr-direct` (anodizer opens the initial fork PR). A probe that can't reach a definitive answer (rate-limit, network error) hard-errors rather than guessing, so a transient blip never routes an existing plugin into a maintainer-hostile fork PR. - `bot`: always POST to the krew-release-bot webhook. Use when the plugin is known to be in krew-index and you want to skip the membership probe entirely. - `pr-direct`: always open a fork PR against krew-index. Use for the initial submission, or a self-hosted krew-index mirror the hosted bot can't reach. |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Override the plugin name (default: crate name). |
| `repository` | RepositoryConfig | тАФ | Unified repository config with branch, token, PR, git SSH support. (Replaces the legacy `manifests_repo:` / `upstream_repo:` form.) The upstream PR target is derived from `repository.pull_request.base` when set, falling back to the canonical kubernetes-sigs/krew-index. |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `short_description` | string | тАФ | One-line summary of the kubectl plugin (max 255 chars). |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip this Krew config. Accepts bool or template string (e.g. `"{{ if .IsSnapshot }}true{{ endif }}"` for conditional skip). Distinct from `skip_upload` so users can opt out of generating the manifest entirely (common when a project is not a kubectl plugin and has no krew channel). |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip publishing. `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prereleases. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `update_existing_pr` | StringOrBool | тАФ | When true, force-push the updated plugin manifest to the existing PR branch when a PR for the same head branch already exists. The PR content is updated in place rather than creating a duplicate. When false (default), the push is skipped and a warning is emitted so the operator sees that the publisher did not update the PR. |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Custom URL template for download URLs (overrides release URL). |

## `crates[].publish.nix`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | тАФ | amd64 microarchitecture variant filter (`v1` / `v2` / `v3` / `v4`). Only artifacts matching this variant are included. Default: `v1`. Typed as `Amd64Variant`, so any value outside `v1`..`v4` is rejected when the config is parsed. |
| `changelog` | string | тАФ | URL for `meta.changelog`. When unset, anodizer derives `<host>/<owner>/<repo>/releases/tag/<tag>` from the crate's `release` repository and the release tag (matching what ripgrep/fd set in nixpkgs). Set this to override (e.g. a `тАж/blob/<tag>/CHANGELOG.md` URL). Templated. Omitted only when no release repo is configured and no explicit value is given. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | тАФ | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | тАФ | Custom commit message template. |
| `dependencies` | list of NixDependency | тАФ | Nix package dependencies with optional OS filtering. |
| `description` | string | тАФ | Short description of the Nix derivation. |
| `extra_install` | string | тАФ | Additional install commands appended after the main install. |
| `formatter` | string | тАФ | Nix formatter to run on the generated file: "alejandra" or "nixfmt". |
| `homepage` | string | тАФ | Project homepage URL. |
| `ids` | list of string | тАФ | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | тАФ | Template-conditional gate: when the rendered result is falsy (`"false"` / `"0"` / `"no"` / empty), the Nix publisher is skipped. Render failure hard-errors. Config key: `nix[].if:`. |
| `install` | string | тАФ | Custom install commands (replaces auto-generated binary install). |
| `license` | string | тАФ | License for the derivation's `meta.license`. Accepts a nix `lib.licenses` attribute (e.g. `mit`, `asl20`) or an SPDX expression (e.g. `MIT`, `Apache-2.0`, `MIT OR Apache-2.0`). A known single id maps to `lib.licenses.<attr>`; an `OR`/`AND` list of known ids maps to `with lib.licenses; [ тАж ]`. An unknown id or an unparseable compound (e.g. a `WITH` exception) degrades to a quoted-string `license` in `meta` тАФ never rejected, never an invalid attr-path. When unset, the license is derived from the crate's `Cargo.toml [package].license`. |
| `long_description` | string | тАФ | Long-form description for `meta.longDescription`, rendered as a multi-line `longDescription = '' тАж '';` block. Optional; omitted when unset. Templated. |
| `main_program` | string | тАФ | Value for `meta.mainProgram` in the generated Nix derivation. When set, the rendered derivation includes `mainProgram = "<value>";` inside the `meta` block, telling Nix which binary `nix run` should execute when the derivation contains multiple executables. Templated: supports `{{ Version }}` etc. Omitted when unset. |
| `maintainers` | list of string | тАФ | nixpkgs maintainer handles (from `lib.maintainers`) rendered as `maintainers = with lib.maintainers; [ alice bob ];` in the derivation's `meta`. These are nixpkgs *handles* (e.g. `globin`, `zowoq`), NOT `Name <email>` author strings тАФ a nixpkgs review rejects a derivation whose `meta.maintainers` is absent. When unset the derivation still emits `maintainers = [ ];` (an empty-but-present list is valid and clears the "field absent" rejection); a user fills in their handle. Each entry is rendered verbatim as a Nix identifier, so values must be valid `lib.maintainers` attribute names. |
| `name` | string | тАФ | Override the derivation name (default: crate name). |
| `path` | string | тАФ | Path for the .nix file in the repository (default: `pkgs/<name>/default.nix`). |
| `post_install` | string | тАФ | Post-install commands (postInstall phase). |
| `repository` | RepositoryConfig | тАФ | Unified repository config with branch, token, PR, git SSH support. |
| `required` | bool | тАФ | Override whether this publisher failing should fail the overall release.<br><br>Default: `false` тАФ a failure here is logged but does not abort the release. Set to `true` to fail the release on any error. |
| `retain_on_rollback` | bool | тАФ | When `true`, a triggered rollback leaves this publisher's work in place rather than attempting to undo it. Default `false`. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip this Nix config. Accepts bool or template string (e.g. `"{{ if .IsSnapshot }}true{{ endif }}"` for conditional skip). Distinct from `skip_upload` so users can model both intents тАФ disable means "don't generate at all", skip_upload means "generate but don't push". Without this field, `nix: { skip: true }` was silently dropped by the serde unknown-field default. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | тАФ | Skip publishing. `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prereleases. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `url_template` | string | тАФ | Custom URL template for download URLs (overrides release URL). |
